meta.question: What are the main packages in the model?
meta.finalAnswer:
The main (top-level) packages in the model include:
- TMT
- Derived Properties
- ViewPoint Libraries
- DEOPS
- TMT-APS DDD
- 08 ViewPoints
- TMT-APS Use Cases
- M1CS Actuator
- IMCE profle adaption for TMT
- TMT-APS L3 Requirements
- TMT-APS Requirements Flow-down
- L3 APT Requirements
- TMT-APS Model Information
- Base Types
- Executive Software
- Sequencers
- Assemblies
- Software Architecture (deprecated)
- 03b OLD: proposed requirements (to be replaced with DOORS imported ones)
